description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- build(deps-dev): bump postcss from 8.5.10 to 8.5.11 by @dependabot[bot] in #1609
- build(deps-dev): bump @typescript-eslint/parser from 8.58.0 to 8.60.0 by @dependabot[bot] in #1561
- build(deps-dev): bump tailwindcss from 4.2.2 to 4.3.0 by @dependabot[bot] in #1560
- feat: migrate to license keys for subscriptions by @zevnda in #1669
- fix(settings): linting errors by @zevnda in #1671
Full Changelog: 5.1.1...5.2.0
